import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/org-admin/StaffDirectory.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/StaffDirectory.tsx");

}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";

const mockFacilities = [

const mockStaff = [

export default function StaffDirectory() {
  _s();
  const [staff, setStaff] = useState(mockStaff);
  const [facilities] = useState(mockFacilities);
  const [showInviteModal, setShowInviteModal] = useState(false);
  const [showRoleModal, setShowRoleModal] = useState(false);
  const [showDetailModal, setShowDetailModal] = useState(false);
  const [showFacilityModal, setShowFacilityModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedStaff, setSelectedStaff] = useState(null);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [facilityFilter, setFacilityFilter] = useState("all");
  const [roleFilter, setRoleFilter] = useState("all");
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const filteredStaff = staff.filter((member) => {
    const matchesSearch = member.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || member.email.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || member.department.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
    const matchesFacility = facilityFilter === "all" || member.assignedFacilities.includes(facilityFilter) || facilityFilter === "unassigned" && member.assignedFacilities.length === 0;
    const matchesRole = roleFilter === "all" || member.role === roleFilter;
    return matchesSearch && matchesFacility && matchesRole;
  });
  const handleInviteStaff = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const form = e.target;
    const selectedFacilities = Array.from(form.facilities).filter((checkbox) => checkbox.checked).map((checkbox) => checkbox.value);
    const newStaff = {
      id: `staff-${String(staff.length + 1).padStart(3, "0")}`,
      name: form.staffName.value,
      email: form.staffEmail.value,
      role: form.staffRole.value,
      department: form.staffDepartment.value,
      status: "pending",
      joinedDate: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      lastActive: "Never",
      assignedFacilities: selectedFacilities,
      facilityAccess: form.facilityAccess.value,
      isFacilityManager: form.staffRole.value === "Facility Manager",
      managedFacilities: form.staffRole.value === "Facility Manager" ? selectedFacilities : void 0
    };
    setStaff([...staff, newStaff]);
    setShowInviteModal(false);
    alert("Invitation sent successfully!");
    form.reset();
  };
  const handleUpdateFacilities = (staffId, facilityIds, access) => {
    setStaff(
      staff.map(
        (s) => s.id === staffId ? {
          ...s,
          assignedFacilities: facilityIds,
          facilityAccess: access,
          managedFacilities: s.isFacilityManager ? facilityIds : s.managedFacilities
        } : s
      )
    );
    setShowFacilityModal(false);
    alert("Facility assignments updated successfully!");
  };
  const handleDeactivate = (id) => {
    if (confirm("Are you sure you want to deactivate this staff member?")) {
      setStaff(
        staff.map((s) => s.id === id ? { ...s, status: "inactive" } : s)
      );
      setShowDetailModal(false);
    }
  };
  const facilityManagerCount = staff.filter((s) => s.isFacilityManager).length;
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bxqp0", _fgB: 1779104381734, _fgD: true, className: "space-y-6", "data-fg-bxqp0": "418.264:418.37177:/src/app/pages/org-admin/StaffDirectory.tsx:258:5:7249:28199:e:div:xtetxtetxtetxtxtxtetxtxtxtxtxtxtxtx:1", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bxqp2", _fgB: 1779104381734, className: "flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-bxqp2": "418.264:418.37177:/src/app/pages/org-admin/StaffDirectory.tsx:260:7:7304:582:e:div:ete", children: [

  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
